name: Brown-Bag Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and drain excess fat.
2. Add refried beans, enchilada sauce, water, minced onion, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and dried oregano to the skillet. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and cover the pan. Simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Warm 3 to 4 tortillas in a microwave for about 45 seconds.
5. Spoon 3 to 4 tablespoons of beef mixture onto the side of each warm tortilla.
6. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons shredded Cheddar cheese on top.
7. Roll up each burrito tightly.
8. Wrap each burrito securely in a paper towel and then in foil.
9. Refrigerate any leftover burritos.
10. To reheat, unwrap the desired number of burritos, remove the paper towel wrapping, and heat them in a microwave for about 1 minute on high.
